entries.note: V55-B continues to consume admissions, headers, JSON blocks, refs, and witness refs only.
The admitted six-artifact seed set remains closed with no thematic widening in V55-B.
V55-B preserves warning-only report and unresolved seam emission without CI or branch-protection gating.
V55-B reuses the shipped V55-A checker/report surfaces by default and does not fork them implicitly.
V55-B adds one bounded descendant-trial hardening pass over the preferred crypto support surface while keeping the same record shapes and predicate family.
